calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: settled off the record at settlement conf. restitution of 459 turk st. #103, sf., ca. agreement forfeited. stayed to 10-17-02 @5 pm, pltf received nothing in damages. if deft does not vacate, pltf is to receive damages of $15.33 per day from 9-13-02 thru 10-17-02, with costs of $191, no atty fees - total of $727.55, each party wavies any claim, any personal property left after 10-17-02 is deemed abandoned. judge pro temp, larry becker;clerk, t.maruyama.
